[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101111011 7
1 110001100 4
2 111010000 4
3 001101010 4
4 110010101 5
5 001101100 4
6 000000101 2
7 100101101 5

70 07 111111111 a
